title: The Exact Value of R(C10, C10, C10)
micro_paper_assessment: Main claim remains micro-paper eligible, but this solve produced only a supportive theorem slice rather than an exact-value closure.
candidate_theorem_slice: Every pure four-block blow-up of a 3-edge-colored K4 with part sizes (5,5,5,5) contains a monochromatic C10; the same holds for part sizes (5,5,5,4).
next_action: Verify the bounded template-elimination computations, then decide whether to attack five-block/refined-template constructions or build a stability proof around the actual 19-vertex lower-bound pattern.
